chunks.title: Organization and Population Status
chunks.reason: Describes the appointment of officials, security measures for the gates, and the sparse population of Jerusalem.

chunks.title: Genealogy of Israelites
chunks.reason: Lists the heads of families and their numbers returning from exile.

chunks.title: Genealogy of Priests and Levites
chunks.reason: Catalogs the numbers of priests, Levites, singers, and gatekeepers.

chunks.title: Genealogy of Temple Servants
chunks.reason: Lists the families of temple servants and Solomon's servants with their total count.

chunks.title: Uncertain Lineages
chunks.reason: Describes those who could not prove their lineage and the resulting restriction on their priesthood.

chunks.title: Total Population and Livestock
chunks.reason: Provides the total assembly count along with numbers of slaves, singers, and livestock.

chunks.title: Donations for the Temple
chunks.reason: Lists the specific amounts of gold, silver, and tunics contributed by leaders and people.

chunks.title: Settlement in Cities
chunks.reason: Concludes the chapter with the people living in their cities and the arrival of the seventh month.
